tool_use.name: Edit
tool_use.param: # Run erk create with both NAME and --from-plan-file result = runner.invok...[truncated 131 chars]..._code != 0 assert "Cannot specify both NAME and --from-plan-file" in result.output
# Run erk create with both NAME and --from-pr-file result = runner.invoke(...[truncated 125 chars]...it_code != 0 assert "Cannot specify both NAME and --from-pr-file" in result.output

tool_use.name: Edit
tool_use.param: # Create worktree from long plan filename result = runner.invoke( cli, ["wt", "create", "--from-plan-file", str(plan_file)], obj=test_ctx, )
# Create worktree from long plan filename result = runner.invoke( cli, ["wt", "create", "--from-pr-file", str(plan_file)], obj=test_ctx, )

tool_use.name: Edit
Edit
tool_use.param:
await pilot.press("1") await pilot.pause()
assert clipboard.last_copied == "erk br co --for-plan 123"

await pilot.press("1") await pilot.pause()
assert clipboard.last_copied == "erk br co --for-pr 123"

session.assistant: Now let me handle the remaining edits in test_plan_file_operations.py that had replace_all issues:

tool_use.name: Edit

session.tool_result: The file /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/workspace/create/test_plan_file_operations.py has been updated successfully.
session.assistant:
Perfect! Now I've successfully updated all 8 test files to rename the CLI flags from the old names to the new names. Here's a summary of the changes made:
## Summary of Changes
### File 1: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/branch/test_create_cmd.py` - Renamed `--for-plan` → `--for-pr` in CLI invocations - Updated docstrings to reference `--for-pr` instead of `--for-plan` - Updated error message assertions: - `"Cannot specify both BRANCH and --for-plan"` → `"Cannot specify both BRANCH and --for-pr"` - `"Must provide BRANCH argument or --for-plan option"` → `"Must provide BRANCH argument or --for-pr option"`
### File 2: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py` - Renamed `--for-plan` → `--for-pr` in CLI invocations - Updated docstrings to reference `--for-pr` - Updated error message assertions (same as File 1)
### File 3: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/workspace/create/test_plan_file_operations.py` - Renamed `--from-plan-file` → `--from-pr-file` in CLI invocations - Renamed `--keep-plan-file` → `--keep-pr-file` in CLI invocations - Updated error message assertions: - `"--keep-plan-file requires --from-plan-file"` → `"--keep-pr-file requires --from-pr-file"` - Updated docstrings to reference new flag names
### File 4: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/workspace/create/test_output_modes.py` - Renamed `--from-plan-file` → `--from-pr-file` in CLI invocations - Updated docstrings
### File 5: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/test_create_copy_impl.py` - Renamed `--from-plan-file` → `--from-pr-file` in CLI invocations - Updated error message assertions for mutual exclusion - Updated docstrings
### File 6: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/management/test_impl.py` - Renamed `--from-plan-file` → `--from-pr-file` in CLI invocations - Updated error message: `"Cannot specify both NAME and --from-plan-file"` → `"Cannot specify both NAME and --from-pr-file"` - Updated docstrings and comments
### File 7: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/commands/test_execute_command.py` - Updated assertions from `"erk br co --for-plan 123"` → `"erk br co --for-pr 123"` - Updated copy notification messages
### File 8: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_plan_detail_screen.py` - Updated clipboard assertion from `"erk br co --for-plan 123"` → `"erk br co --for-pr 123"`
All changes were made using targeted edits with the Edit tool, preserving the exact file structure and only modifying the CLI flag strings, error messages, and relevant docstrings/comments. Function names and other conceptual references were left unchanged as instructed.
